name: Spiced Buttermilk Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the margarine until smooth.
2. Gradually add sugar, beating well after each addition.
3. Add eggs one at a time, mixing thoroughly after each egg is incorporated.
4. Combine baking powder, salt, and cinnamon in a separate bowl.
5. Alternately add dry ingredients to buttermilk, beginning and ending with flour, stirring until just combined.
6. Stir in pecans and vanilla extract.
7. Pour batter into a greased or sprayed 10-inch tube pan or Bundt pan.
8. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour and 15 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Allow to cool in the pan for 10 to 15 minutes before removing it completely.
